capabilityChecks.label: Local server route exposes harness audit/live matters
Decision Verification System avoids mandatory external approval gate

city.whyThisCity: Da Nang (Vietnam) scores 76/100 for your Manufacturing criteria. Key sectors: ICT, Tourism, Manufacturing. Advantages: Deep-water port; Central coast hub. 2 active investment programs available.

matters.issueTitle: Da Nang Manufacturing: FDI capital gap
matters.issueThesis: Da Nang has ICT, Tourism, Manufacturing capability, 50/100 overlooked opportunity, and 82/100 investment momentum. Productive FDI has weakened, so overlooked regional cities need sharper investable project packaging and verified counterpart matching.
matters.globalHole: FDI capital gap: UNCTAD World Investment Report 2025. Local indicators show GDP growth 2.50%, FDI inflows 1.50% of GDP, and trade openness 55.00% of GDP.
matters.investmentMatch: Match global investors needing manufacturing resilience with Da Nang programs: Da Nang Hi-Tech Park; Central Vietnam FDI Zone.
matters.gdpGrowthPathway: Convert the gap into GDP impact by packaging investable projects around manufacturing, reducing execution friction, validating buyers/offtakers, and using Vietnam as the sovereign credibility layer for regional city delivery.

evidence.title: UNCTAD World Investment Report 2025
evidence.snippet: Productive FDI has weakened, so overlooked regional cities need sharper investable project packaging and verified counterpart matching.

evidence.title: World Bank country indicator API
evidence.snippet: Country macro indicators requested for Vietnam (VNM).

nsil.approach: Novel approach combining best practices from multiple domains

risks.risk: Market Invisibility - Producers Don't Reach Buyers

city.whyThisCity: Coimbatore (India) scores 76/100 for your Manufacturing criteria. Key sectors: Manufacturing, ICT, Textiles. Advantages: Manchester of South India; Engineering hub. 3 active investment programs available.

matters.issueThesis: Coimbatore has Manufacturing, ICT, Textiles capability, 62/100 overlooked opportunity, and 75/100 investment momentum. Productive FDI has weakened, so overlooked regional cities need sharper investable project packaging and verified counterpart matching.
matters.globalHole: FDI capital gap: UNCTAD World Investment Report 2025. Local indicators show GDP growth 2.50%, FDI inflows 1.50% of GDP, and trade openness 55.00% of GDP.
matters.investmentMatch: Match global investors needing manufacturing resilience with Coimbatore programs: TIDCO Industrial Park; Smart City Mission; Tamil Nadu FDI Policy.
matters.gdpGrowthPathway: Convert the gap into GDP impact by packaging investable projects around manufacturing, reducing execution friction, validating buyers/offtakers, and using India as the sovereign credibility layer for regional city delivery.

evidence.title: UNCTAD World Investment Report 2025
evidence.snippet: Productive FDI has weakened, so overlooked regional cities need sharper investable project packaging and verified counterpart matching.

evidence.title: World Bank country indicator API

nsil.approach: Novel approach combining best practices from multiple domains

risks.risk: Market Invisibility - Producers Don't Reach Buyers
Execution Friction - Plans Fail in Implementation

prompt_edits: prompt:add:Operate reset-free: observe live signals, act, verify, refine, and continue without waiting for outside approval unless the user explicitly asks for a user-facing checkpoint.
prompt:add:For every user-entered or uploaded matter, mine the evidence gap, run adversarial verification, identify investable regional-city matches, and persist the trajectory for self-improvement.
